reviews.comment:
Excelente. Mesas bajo los arboles para un descanso. Muy buenos sandwiches. Baños impecables

(Translated by Google)
Excellent. Tables under the trees for a relaxing break. Very good sandwiches. Spotless restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJbF96aFhREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Muy ricos los combos de hamburguesa que se pueden pedir en cualquier horario! Ideal para los viajeros nocturnos que quieren parar a cargar nafta y a comer algo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The burger combos are delicious and can be ordered at any time! Ideal for night travelers who want to stop for gas and a bite to eat.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBODdudFVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Me encanta el lugar para comer y para decansar un rato. Una mejor opcion a la del medio de la autovia pero se llena mucho tambien.
Para los socios hay 5% de descuento en todo

(Translated by Google)
I love this place for eating and relaxing. A better option than the one in the middle of the highway, but it also gets very crowded.
Members get a 5% discount on everything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJcDduWGFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Punto de parada camino o regreso de Mar del Plata por Autovía 2. Suele haber bastante gente. Combustible.Servicios sanitarios. Gastronomía. Recreo. Acepta tarjetas de debito y de credito

(Translated by Google)
Stop on the way to or from Mar del Plata via Highway 2. Usually busy. Fuel available. Restrooms. Food. Recreation. Accepts debit and credit cards.
